name: flashcms
summary: Initial extracted release. Puck pages, TipTap posts, media library, users, analytics + Web Vitals, SEO, site-settings.
notes: Snapshot cut from the sfh-group-website working codebase.
See docs/extending.md for the pattern to add tables/blocks/routes.

changes: Includes Puck page editor, TipTap posts, media library, users + roles, analytics (visits + Web Vitals), SEO, site-settings, in-CMS update flow, and a full admin UI.
